content_blocks.text:
Deploy to **Halibut** — that's your staging Kubernetes cluster (per a note ingested 2026-01-01). Production is Marlin, and the documented flow is: validate on Halibut first, then promote to Marlin only after it passes there.

One caveat: this comes from a single stored note, so if your cluster naming has changed since, verify against your current kubeconfig/contexts before deploying.
